name: Life Kline Visual Asset Production Workflow
description: Repository-owned workflow contract for image, narrative, QA, correction, storage and future R2 publication.
promptContract: Use the full image generation capability: layered scenes, diagrams, cards, arrows, timelines, symbolic objects and useful details.
Keep 世界易 / 人生K线 / www.life-kline.com as a compact lower-right or bottom signature; it must never dominate the canvas.
Render title, explanation labels and brand/domain directly in the generated image; do not rely on SVG or HTML overlays.
Each image in a batch must have a distinct composition silhouette while sharing the same brand palette.
Sensitive metaphysics topics must stay educational, non-fear-based and non-deterministic.
